description_long: This object is a rectangular stone monument featuring a high-relief sculptural scene on its front face. The relief depicts three human figures: a seated woman, a standing woman, and a bearded man in the background, all rendered in classical Greco-Roman style. The figures are framed by a shallow architectural niche with a projecting cornice and side pilasters, giving the monument a sense of depth and formality. The stone surface is weathered, with visible chisel marks and some areas of rough, unfinished texture along the sides and back. The base is a simple, solid rectangular plinth, slightly wider than the main body, providing stability and visual grounding. The sides and back are largely undecorated, emphasizing the prominence of the sculpted front.
description: A rectangular stone monument with a detailed classical relief of three figures framed by an architectural niche, set on a solid plinth. The sides and back are rough and undecorated, highlighting the ornate front.
description_view_0: A side view showing the monument's depth, rough stone texture, and the projecting cornice at the top.
description_view_1: The front view displays the detailed relief of three classical figures within an architectural frame, with the plinth and cornice clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, reveals the monument's thickness and the unfinished stone surface.
description_view_3: Another frontal view, closely resembling view 1, emphasizing the sculpted figures and architectural details.
attribute_ornamentation: High-relief sculptural scene of three classical figures on the front face, framed by an architectural niche with a cornice and pilasters.
attribute_base_design: The base is a solid, rectangular plinth made of the same stone as the monument, slightly wider than the main body, with a flat top and minimal decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and rectangular, capped by a projecting cornice with simple linear molding, lacking any pointed or pyramidal features.
